object_description: composed of white bricks laid out in a horizontal pattern with thin gray mortar lines separating each brick, the wall is smooth and uninterrupted except for a few small fixtures embedded within it.
installed on the wall at a moderate height above the ground, this outlet is rectangular with rounded corners, featuring multiple sockets and a toggle switch positioned above them.

this control panel is housed in a compact, rectangular enclosure with a matte finish, including several terminals connected by cables, a central toggle switch, and warning labels affixed to its surface.

a label affixed to the wall beneath the electrical outlet, displaying text and symbols related to safety or operational guidelines, though the specifics are not fully legible due to resolution limitations.
a slender pipe runs vertically along the wall, originating from the bottom left corner and extending upwards toward the electrical outlet, appearing to be made of metal with a dull, oxidized surface.
gray rectangular electrical box with a black cable extending from it and a small yellow component on the front panel.
smooth white brick wall with evenly spaced horizontal rows and a clean, uninterrupted surface; there is no visible texture or variation in the bricks themselves.
horizontal beam painted in a vibrant yellow hue, spanning the width of the image and contrasting sharply with the surrounding white wall.
rectangular gray sign with a red label featuring text, affixed to the wall near the electrical box.
